final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic knowledge card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era, in a single large card layout with cartoon illustration storytelling style.

Style/medium: flat cartoon illustration infographic, bright and friendly children's book aesthetic, clean vector-style art with bold outlines
Composition: single large vertical card layout; prominent title banner at top, cartoon story scene as the central visual, bullet-point key facts panel arranged along the side
Subject: the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) — key figures include Cao Cao (曹操), Zhou Yu (周瑜), and Zhuge Liang (诸葛亮); scene depicts fire ships on the Yangtze River, armies in battle, dramatic flames on water
Scene/backdrop: the Yangtze River at night with fire spreading across enemy warships, dramatic yet child-friendly cartoon rendering
Lighting/mood: warm orange and red glow from the fire on the river, exciting and adventurous mood appropriate for children
Color palette: warm reds and oranges as dominant accent for fire and drama, cool blue-green for the river, bright primary colors for character costumes to aid visual distinction
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: title "赤壁之战" must be large and clearly legible at the top of the card; key story points listed with bullet markers along the side panel; all text elements sized for child readability; single self-contained card, no multi-panel split
Avoid: overly complex or dark imagery, realistic gore or violence, cluttered layout, adult editorial style, watermark
